title: Subadult Virtual Anthropology Database (SVAD) Data Collection Protocol: Dental Morphological Traits
author: Scott, G Richard
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document presents the standardized protocol for scoring dental morphology traits on virtual 3D renderings of permanent and deciduous teeth using the Amira visualization software. This protocol was developed as part of National Institute of Justice Award 2019 DU-BX-0039.
steps_raw: This document presents the standardized protocol for scoring dental morphology traits on virtual 3D renderings of permanent and deciduous teeth using the Amira visualization software. This protocol was developed as part of National Institute of Justice Award 2019 DU-BX-0039.
